candidates.name: The Hastings Center
candidates.description: Leading bioethics research institute -- publishes analysis on gene editing ethics, end-of-life care, AI ethics, research integrity, and moral frameworks in healthcare and technology

test_signals.title: Genetic Therapies for Rare Diseases: Developing Ethical Regulatory Policies
test_signals.relevance: s_spiritual -- bioethics governance of gene therapy, balancing patient access with safety protections

test_signals.title: Whispered Compassion: Slow Codes, Ritual, and the Moral Limits of Transparency
test_signals.relevance: s_spiritual -- end-of-life ethics, moral tension between medical transparency and compassionate care

test_signals.title: More and 'Better' Babies: The Dark Side of the Pronatalist Movement
test_signals.relevance: s_spiritual + S_Social -- eugenics parallels in tech elite pronatalism, genetic embryo selection ethics

candidates.recommendation: STRONG -- premier bioethics source, directly fills s_spiritual gap with rigorous academic-quality content. No existing source covers bioethics at this depth.

candidates.name: The New Humanitarian
candidates.description: Independent journalism on humanitarian crises, displacement, migration, conflict, and social justice worldwide -- formerly IRIN News (UN-affiliated until 2015)
candidates.discovery_keyword: death dying dignity end of life ethics RSS

test_signals.title: Displaced but uncounted: The people aid is leaving behind in Lebanon's war
test_signals.relevance: S_Social -- vulnerable populations overlooked in humanitarian response, displacement crisis

test_signals.title: When gender equity NGOs close, more disappears than can be measured
test_signals.relevance: S_Social + s_spiritual -- systemic impact on women's rights when civil society organizations collapse

test_signals.title: South Sudan power-sharing collapse drives violence and mass displacement
test_signals.relevance: P_Political + S_Social -- political instability causing humanitarian crisis, governance failure

candidates.recommendation: STRONG -- fills S_Social and P_Political gaps with high-quality independent humanitarian journalism. Unique geographic coverage (Africa, Middle East, Latin America) not duplicated by existing sources.

candidates.name: Mongabay
